description: 2/4 Packs Ladies Cosy Socks Soft Fleece Brushed Gripper Sole Bed Lounge Lasting Ladies/Womens super soft comfort fit Lounge socks walking by Style It up Ltd, Great stretch Available in two colourways: Pink & Purple. Also available in one size which is 4-8 98% Polyester, 2% Elastane, Fluffy soft material for extra comfort Soft & warm perfect for cold weather. Grippers on the sole of the sock to prevent slips and give added grip The lightweight breathable fabric makes these socks perfect for everyday wear around the house and lounging around in nightwear/pyjamas. Great Gift/Present for birthdays/ Christmas
